full_name: UAE Personal Data Protection Law (Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021)

controls.description: Organization must maintain a comprehensive record of all personal data processing activities including categories of data, purposes, retention periods, and recipients.
controls.logic: FAIL if no ROPA table or equivalent log exists, or if processing_purpose, data_category, or retention_period fields are NULL or empty for any active processing record.

controls.description: Organizations engaging in high-risk or large-scale processing must appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO).
controls.logic: FAIL if the organization processes sensitive personal data at scale and no DPO role is registered in the HR or roles system.

controls.description: A clear, accessible privacy policy must exist documenting data collection practices, purposes, data subject rights, and security measures.
controls.logic: FAIL if no privacy_policy record exists, or if the policy has not been reviewed/updated within the last 12 months.

controls.requirement: Lawful Basis Documented for Each Processing Activity
controls.description: Every personal data processing activity must be grounded in a documented legal basis: consent, contractual necessity, legal obligation, vital interests, or legitimate interests.
controls.logic: FAIL if any processing record has a NULL or blank legal_basis field.

controls.description: Where consent is the lawful basis, it must be freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous. Users must be able to withdraw consent at any time.
controls.logic: FAIL if consent records lack a timestamp, if consent_withdrawn flag is missing, or if consent was bundled with other terms without a separate explicit opt-in.

controls.requirement: Right of Access Fulfilled Within Timeframe
controls.description: Organizations must respond to data subject access requests (DSARs) within the legally required timeframe.
controls.logic: FAIL if any DSAR record has a response_date that is more than 30 days after the request_date, or if response_date is NULL for requests older than 30 days.

controls.description: When a data subject requests erasure and the data is no longer needed or consent is withdrawn, the data must be deleted.
controls.logic: FAIL if erasure_request records exist with status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'REJECTED_WITH_REASON') after 30 days of request.

controls.description: Personal data must be provided in a structured, machine-readable format upon request.
controls.logic: FAIL if portability_request records exist with no fulfillment_date or if format provided is not a standard machine-readable format.

controls.requirement: Encryption of Personal Data at Rest and in Transit
controls.description: Personal data must be protected using encryption and pseudonymization proportionate to the risk.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user_data or personal_data table has records where encryption_status = 'NONE' or encryption_flag = 0.

controls.requirement: Access Controls Limited to Authorized Personnel
controls.description: Access to personal data must be limited to authorized personnel only, with access controlled by role.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has access to personal data tables but their role is not in the approved_data_access_roles list, or if users outside the authorized department can query sensitive tables.

controls.description: Organizations must conduct periodic security assessments and Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs) for high-risk processing.
controls.logic: FAIL if no DPIA record exists for high-risk processing activities, or if the last_assessment_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: Data breaches must be reported to the UAE Data Office and affected data subjects promptly.
controls.logic: FAIL if any incident record with incident_type = 'DATA_BREACH' has a notification_date more than 72 hours after detection_date, or if notification_date is NULL.

controls.requirement: International Data Transfers Comply with Adequacy Requirements
controls.description: Cross-border transfers of personal data must meet legal requirements and ensure adequate protection.
controls.logic: FAIL if any data_transfer record has destination_country in a non-adequate jurisdiction AND transfer_mechanism is NULL or INVALID.

controls.requirement: Data Processing Agreements with Third-Party Processors
controls.description: All third-party data processors must be bound by a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) meeting PDPL requirements.
controls.logic: FAIL if any vendor record with data_processor_flag = TRUE has no linked DPA document or if DPA expiry_date is past.

controls.description: Only personal data that is adequate, relevant, and limited to what is necessary for the specified purpose should be collected.
controls.logic: FAIL if data_collection records include fields not justified by the stated processing_purpose, or if optional_data_fields are collected without documented justification.

controls.description: Personal data must be retained only as long as necessary and deleted/anonymized when the purpose is fulfilled.
controls.logic: FAIL if any personal data record has a created_date older than its retention_period and deletion_status is NOT 'DELETED' or 'ANONYMIZED'.
